hall1.name: Hall 1
hall1.description: One of the main halls of KINTEX Center 1, suitable for large-scale exhibitions and events.

hall2.name: Hall 2
hall2.description: A multi-purpose exhibition space hosting various industrial exhibitions and conventions.

hall3.name: Hall 3
hall3.description: An exhibition hall boasting a high ceiling height that allows for double-decker booth installation.

hall4.name: Hall 4
hall4.description: A space with a solid floor load capable of heavy equipment exhibition.

hall5.name: Hall 5
hall5.description: The last hall of Center 1, capable of large-scale integrated exhibition in conjunction with Hall 4.

hall6.name: Hall 6
hall6.description: The starting hall of Center 2, suitable for small and medium-sized professional exhibitions.

hall7.name: Hall 7
hall7.description: A large hall of Center 2, providing modern facilities and wide spaces.

hall8.name: Hall 8
hall8.description: A space where international exhibitions and corporate events are actively held.

hall9.name: Hall 9
hall9.description: One of the largest single halls in KINTEX, optimized for ultra-large events.

hall10.name: Hall 10
hall10.description: An exhibition hall where the latest architectural technologies are concentrated, supporting mammoth-scale events with Hall 9.

fSodam.name: Sodam (Korean)
fSodam.description: KINTEX's representative Korean restaurant providing neat Korean meals.

fBenvenuto.name: Caffe Bene
fBenvenuto.description: A cafe providing a comfortable rest space with a view of the exhibition hall.

fMyeongdong.name: Myeongdong Kalguksu
fMyeongdong.description: A noodle restaurant famous for its deep broth and chewy noodles.

cCu1.name: CU Convenience Store
cCu1.description: Various drinks, snacks, and convenience items are prepared for visitors.

cPress.name: Press Center
cPress.description: A space for journalists to write articles and hold briefings.

hSonocalm.name: Sono Calm Goyang
hSonocalm.description: A premium 5-star hotel near KINTEX providing the best relaxation.

hGloucester.name: Gloucester Hotel KINTEX
hGloucester.description: Located right next to KINTEX, providing optimal accessibility for business visitors.

medical.name: Medical Room
medical.description: A space where you can get help in case of emergency or health problems.

welcomeZone.name: Welcome Zone
welcomeZone.description: Welcoming area marking the start of the convention.

translationCenter.name: Translation Support Center
translationCenter.description: Hub for multilingual translation and guidance.

giftZone.name: Souvenir Zone
giftZone.description: Place to collect event completion rewards.

sodam.name: Sodam Dining
sodam.description: Space for participant meals and relaxation.

gate4.name: Gate 4
gate4.description: Main gate connecting to the parking lot and exterior.
